nasb.text: She said to him, “Give me a blessing, since you have given me the land of the Negev, give me also springs of water.” So Caleb gave her the upper springs and the lower springs.

esv.text: She said to him, “Give me a blessing. Since you have set me in the land of the Negeb, give me also springs of water.” And Caleb gave her the upper springs and the lower springs.

cnv.text: 她回答：“請你給我一份禮物；你既然把我安置在南地，求你也把水泉賜給我。”迦勒就把上泉和下泉都給了她。

ccb.text: 她回答说：“求你恩待我，你既然把南部的干地赐给我，求你也把水泉给我吧。”于是，迦勒把上泉和下泉都给了她。
